title: Trading-Pod KV Schema
description: Documents Cloudflare KV key patterns. KV is used for READ-HEAVY config only (1,000 writes/day free tier limit). All stateful data lives in D1.

config:risk_rules.description: Risk rule configuration parameters for the FC

config:agents.description: Agent registration metadata (agentId, name, enabled status)
config:agents.readFrequency: On worker startup and agent listing

config:treasurer_limits.description: Treasurer limit overrides (ceiling, daily limit, scale bounds)

config:tax.description: Tax Collector configuration (reserve rate, annual exempt amount, exempt toggle)
config:tax.writeFrequency: Rarely (annual tax year changes or user toggle)

config:webhook_secret.description: Shared secret for validating TradingView webhook payloads
